name: Classic Sticky Buns
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Brown sugar (or maple-sugar if available)
1 cup King Arthur White Whole Wheat Flour
5 cups King Arthur All-Purpose Flour (more or less as desired)
1/4 cup Brown sugar (or maple if desired and available)
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a smooth, supple dough by hand or with a machine and let it rise for 1 hour. Punch it down and roll into a 12-inch X 24-inch rectangle.
2. Brush the dough with melted butter and sprinkle on the filling ingredients.
3. Grease an 14-inch round pan and add the topping ingredients. Roll up the dough from the long side (jelly roll style) and cut into 1-inch thick slices. Place the slices in the pan, cover, and let rise for 30 minutes.
4. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 30 to 35 minutes, using foil to prevent over-browning. Carefully invert onto a cooling rack and let cool slightly before serving.
